title: andropogon gerardi var. incanescens
intro: Andropogon gerardi var. incanescens, also known as false buffalo grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. In herbal preparations, Andropogon gerardi var. incanescens is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
